calibration_notes: My recent BEARISH calls on tech (NVDA 3/3 wrong) failed when I ignored positive AI sector momentum - focusing too much on broad market weakness. META performed exactly as predicted (-4.21%) showing sector-specific analysis works better than broad strokes. For NVDA specifically, I'm now weighing MU's massive call flow ($2.26M deep ITM) as a tech sector tell.
